body:
closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCalibrate.jl/issues/329 - This PR adds a "How do I?" section to the documentation for common questions for calibration. In the future, this should b expanded whenever new questions about using `ClimaCalibrate` or general purpose questions about calibration come up.

TODO

- [x] Use `@example` to run the code so that it doesn't become stale in the future
title: Add How do I? section
